Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
    Class
    Description
    Markdown
    Annotation for customizing Markdown serialization and parsing behavior on classes, methods, and fields.
    MarkdownApply
    Dynamically applies a @Markdown annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    MarkdownApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarkdownBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the Markdown serializers and parsers pulled from the @Markdown annotation on the bean property.
    MarkdownClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the Markdown serializers and parsers pulled from the @Markdown annotation on the class.
    MarkdownConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in MarkdownSerializer and MarkdownParser.
    MarkdownDocParser
    Parses Markdown document-mode output (headings + tables) back to POJOs.
    MarkdownDocParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarkdownDocParserSession
    Session object for MarkdownDocParser.
    MarkdownDocParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarkdownDocSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to Markdown document mode (headings + tables).
    MarkdownDocSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarkdownDocSerializerSession
    Session object for MarkdownDocSerializer.
    MarkdownDocSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarkdownFormat
    Rendering format for Markdown serialization.
    MarkdownMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to MarkdownClassMeta and MarkdownBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    MarkdownParser
    Parses Markdown fragment-mode output (tables and lists) back to POJOs.
    MarkdownParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarkdownParser.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed MarkdownParser.create() / MarkdownParser.copy() path.
    MarkdownParserSession
    Session object for MarkdownParser.
    MarkdownParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarkdownSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to Markdown (fragment mode: tables and lists).
    MarkdownSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarkdownSerializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed MarkdownSerializer.create() / MarkdownSerializer.copy() path.
    MarkdownSerializerSession
    Session object for MarkdownSerializer.
    MarkdownSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    MarkdownWriter
    Low-level Markdown writer providing helper methods for producing Markdown output.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
    Class
    Description
    MarkdownDocParser
    Parses Markdown document-mode output (headings + tables) back to POJOs.
    MarkdownDocSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to Markdown document mode (headings + tables).
    MarkdownParser
    Parses Markdown fragment-mode output (tables and lists) back to POJOs.
    MarkdownSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to Markdown (fragment mode: tables and lists).
